name: Spinach Tomato Bake
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces frozen spinach, thawed and moisture squeezed out
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring water to a boil and add butter and salt.
2. Add rice, stir, cover, and reduce heat to low.
3. Simmer for 35 to 45 minutes until water is absorbed. Set aside.
4. In a separate pan, sauté onion in oil over medium heat for about 4 minutes.
5. Add garlic, mushrooms, and chopped spinach. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Sauté another 4 to 6 minutes until onion and mushrooms are tender.
7. Toss the sauteed vegetables with cooked brown rice.
8. Add more salt and pepper if desired.
9. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Lightly butter a 9 by 13 inch pan or casserole dish.
11. Layer the vegetable-rice mixture over the bottom of the pan.
12. Sprinkle with half of the shredded cheddar cheese.
13. Layer with half of the sliced tomatoes and season with salt and pepper.
14. Sprinkle with remaining cheddar cheese and add another layer of tomatoes.
15. Finish with grated Romano cheese and a sprinkle of bread crumbs (if desired).
16. Bake until the cheese melts and vegetables are heated through.
